project_area: Programs and services for Perry County citizens
demographic_requirements: Nonprofit organizations serving Perry County citizens
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must have 501(c)(3) status, utilize a fiscal sponsor with 501(c)(3) status, or demonstrate nonprofit status as a church, school, or similar entity. TFEC grantmaking does not fund advertising, capital campaigns, direct lobbying to influence legislation, individuals, religious organizations for the propagation of religious doctrine, or retroactive projects.
